title: Seam Composition
description: Schema for seam-lint YAML composition files. Defines tool specifications, their internal state vs observable schema, and the bilateral edges connecting them.

name.description: Human-readable name for this composition. Defaults to the filename stem if omitted.

tools.description: Map of tool names to their specifications.

toolSpec.description: A tool's internal state (S) and observable schema (F). observable_schema must be a subset of internal_state.

internal_state.description: All semantic dimensions the tool operates on internally. This is S(v) — the full stalk.

observable_schema.description: Semantic dimensions visible in the tool's API contract. This is F(v) — the observable sub-sheaf. Must be a subset of internal_state.

edge.description: A bilateral interface between two tools, specifying which semantic dimensions are shared.

from.description: Source tool name. Must match a key in 'tools'.

to.description: Target tool name. Must match a key in 'tools'.

dimensions.description: Semantic dimensions shared across this edge.

semanticDimension.description: A named semantic dimension shared between two tools on an edge. from_field and to_field map to fields in the respective tools' internal_state.

name.description: Identifier for this bilateral consistency constraint.

from_field.description: Field name in the source tool's internal_state that carries this dimension.

to_field.description: Field name in the target tool's internal_state that carries this dimension.
